audit_items.proof_trace: At line 160, `int256(report.price).toUint256()` widens the `int192` price to `int256` (sign-preserving) then applies OZ SafeCast `toUint256(int256)`, which reverts if value < 0. This check is applied unconditionally in every loop iteration, and no path writes to `s_dataStreamsPrice` without passing through it.
